title: hitlist
text: hitlist A temporary list of the primary key or physical record address of every occurrence of an entity in a database that matches a retrieve profile (each occurrence is one hit), but which has not yet been fetched from the database. The actual occurrences are fetched only when required. Related Links primary key A field or group of fields designated as the unique identifier of each occurrence of an entity. occurrence One instance of the entity in the database. Equivalent to a row or tuple in a field-level DBMS, or a record in a record-level DBMS. retrieve profile A range of one or more values for one or more fields in an entity often containing profile characters, that can be used to control the scope of the data to be retrieved from the database. select cache The hitlist when it contains complete occurrences, instead of only the primary key or physical record address of the occurrences.
